channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: One MCU Movie Is Actually Quietly A Great Romantic Comedy

item.title: Britney Spears Arrested for DUI in California
item.description: Britney Spears is facing some legal trouble. The “Circus” singer was arrested just after 9 p.m. local time on the evening of March 4, according to pol...

item.title: The Forgotten Resident Evil Movie Is Trending Ahead Of The New 2026 Film
